mnemonics: TEST: Think 'Evaluate & Scrutinize Thoroughly' to remember the purpose of the test component is to evaluate the final model's performance on unseen data.
keyPoints: The test set is a separate, held-out dataset used only for the final evaluation of a trained model.
Its purpose is to provide an unbiased estimate of the model's performance on new, unseen data (generalization error).
The test set must never be used during model training or tuning to avoid data leakage and an overly optimistic performance estimate.
commonMistakes: Using the test set for model tuning or feature selection, which contaminates the evaluation.
Not having a representative test set, leading to a poor estimate of real-world performance.
Creating a test set that is too small to provide a statistically significant performance metric.
